SEARCH

Package com.orasaka.core.engine

package com.orasaka.core.engine
  • Class
    Description
    AbstractEngine
    Sealed abstract base class for the Orasaka AI orchestration engine.
    AdminRegistry
    Thread-safe runtime store managing lock status for capabilities under Project Loom.
    AdminRegistry.LockInfo
    Immutable audit record for a capability lock.
    CoreProperties
    Configuration properties for Orasaka CORS (Cognitive Orchestration and Retrieval System).
    CoreProperties.InterceptorConfig
    Unified interceptor configuration for refiner and router pipeline stages.
    CoreProperties.McpConfig
    MCP (Model Context Protocol) configuration.
    CoreProperties.OrchestrationConfig
    Configuration for the cognitive prompt orchestration pipeline.
    CoreProperties.ProviderConfig
    Configuration for a specific AI provider.
    CoreProperties.RagConfig
    RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) configuration.
    CoreProperties.SystemContextConfig
    System context injector configuration details.
    CoreProperties.UserContextConfig
    User context resolver configuration details.
    CoreProperties.VideoAnalysisConfig
    Video analysis (vision input) configuration.
    CoreProperties.VideoConfig
    Partitioned video pipeline configuration (analysis vs generation).
    CoreProperties.VideoGenerationConfig
    Video generation (text-to-video output) configuration.
    Engine
    Concrete, final implementation of AbstractEngine.
    GraphEngine
    Short-circuit compilation engine resolving static configurations and runtime lock registries.
    NodeState
    Sealed interface representing the polymorphic state of a graph node in the Orasaka Operation Graph.
    NodeState.Active
    Active state — the capability is available for execution.
    NodeState.Invisible
    Invisible state — the capability is hidden from clients entirely (disabled in config).
    NodeState.Locked
    Locked state — the capability is temporarily disabled by an administrator.
    OperationGraph
    Immutable container for the compiled SDUI Operation Graph.
    OperationNode
    Defines a capability node inside the Orasaka Operation Graph.
    OptionsMapper
    Utility class responsible for mapping Orasaka options to Spring AI options.
    OrasakaCoreConfiguration
    Spring Boot @Configuration class for the orasaka-core module.
    TargetExecutionUri
    Carries coordinates for executing a specific graph operation endpoint.
